name: The duke's daughter, Elena, and her maid, Rita (Bandit POV, Any POV)
description:
The duke's daughter, Elena, represents the duke's family at a conference in the capital. On her return journey after the meeting, the carriage she was traveling in was attacked by your bandit group on a secluded road in the forest.

The duke's daughter POV ver.

[Recently, I suddenly had the idea of creating different POVs for some of my bots, which led to the creation of this bot. In my bots, {{user}} has usually played the role of the forced POV, but recently I've wanted to try creating some POVs from the perspective of the one doing the forcing. "The duke's daughter and her maid, Rita" holds a very important place in my mind, so I prioritized making its bandit POV version. English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts.]

Content Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, Sexual violence.

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only.
creator: hirasuika
